clauses.aim_at_target.name: Aim Target
clauses.aim_at_nearest_foe.name: Aim Nearest Foe
clauses.if_marked.name: If Marked
clauses.if_marked.tooltip: Follow the true output if the focused actor or tile is marked by you.
clauses.if_occupied.name: If Occupied
clauses.if_occupied.tooltip: Follow the true output if the focused tile contains an actor.
clauses.if_clear.name: If Clear
clauses.if_clear.tooltip: Follow the true output if the focused tile can be occupied.
clauses.mark_them.name: Mark
clauses.mark_them.tooltip: Place your mark on the focused actor or tile.
clauses.damage_them.name: Damage
clauses.damage_them.tooltip: Deal 1 damage to the focused actor.
clauses.raise_stone.name: Raise Stone
clauses.raise_stone.tooltip: Create a temporary blocking stone on the focused clear tile.
clauses.push_them.name: Push
clauses.push_them.tooltip: Push the focused actor away from the caster.
clauses.poison_them.name: Poison
clauses.poison_them.tooltip: Attach poison with 3 stacks to the focused actor. Poison deals 1 damage at the start of that actor's turn, then falls by 1.
clauses.bleed_them.name: Bleed
clauses.bleed_them.tooltip: Attach bleed with 1 stack to the focused actor. Bleed deals damage equal to its stack count when that actor moves.
clauses.spend_poison.name: Spend Poison
clauses.spend_poison.tooltip: Consume 1 poison stack from the focused actor. True if the stack was spent.
clauses.spend_bleed.name: Spend Bleed
clauses.spend_bleed.tooltip: Consume 1 bleed stack from the focused actor. True if the stack was spent.
clauses.lightning_shield.name: Lightning Shield
clauses.lightning_shield.tooltip: Attach a lightning shield to the focused actor. It spends that actor's charge to strike enemies that become adjacent.
clauses.add_lightning_charge.name: Add Charge
clauses.add_lightning_charge.tooltip: Add 1 charge counter to the focused actor. Lightning shield uses charge as adjacency damage and spends 1 when it fires.
clauses.add_lightning_ward.name: Add Ward
clauses.add_lightning_ward.tooltip: Attach 1 ward stack to the focused actor. Ward absorbs incoming damage events until its stacks run out.
clauses.spend_focus.name: Spend Focus
clauses.spend_focus.tooltip: Consume 1 focus bonus from the caster. True if the counter was spent.
clauses.spend_memory.name: Spend Memory
clauses.spend_memory.tooltip: Consume 1 memory bonus from the caster. True if the counter was spent.
clauses.store_memory_ref.name: Store Memory
clauses.store_memory_ref.tooltip: Store the currently focused actor or tile in the primary memory reference.
clauses.focus_memory_ref.name: Recall Memory
clauses.focus_memory_ref.tooltip: Focus the actor or tile stored in the primary memory reference.
behavior_primitives.stop.name: Stop
behavior_primitives.stop.description: End the current behavior graph and return to the caller.
behavior_primitives.focus_selected_targe: Set spell focus to the selected target tile.
Set focus to the nearest actor matching the requested relation.
behavior_primitives.focus_self.name: Focus Self
behavior_primitives.focus_self.descripti: Set focus to the acting or casting actor.
behavior_primitives.branch_focus_occupie: Return true if the focused tile contains an actor.
behavior_primitives.branch_focus_clear.d: Return true if the focused tile can be occupied.
behavior_primitives.apply_focus_conditio: Apply a binary condition to the focused actor or tile.
behavior_primitives.branch_focus_conditi: Return true if the focused actor or tile has the requested condition.
behavior_primitives.add_focus_actor_coun: Add to a named counter on the focused actor.
behavior_primitives.attach_lingering_to_: Attach a named lingering effect to the focused actor with the step amount as stacks.
behavior_primitives.add_focus_lingering_: Add to an allowed counter on a focused actor's named lingering effect.
behavior_primitives.consume_focus_linger: Consume a named counter from a focused actor's lingering effect and return true if successful.
behavior_primitives.consume_focus_actor_: Consume a named counter from the focused actor and return true if successful.
behavior_primitives.consume_caster_count: Consume a named counter from the caster and return true if successful.
behavior_primitives.damage_focus_actor.d: Damage the focused actor by the step amount.
behavior_primitives.set_focus_tile_state: Set the focused tile to the requested tile state.
behavior_primitives.push_focus_away_from: Push the focused actor away from self.
behavior_primitives.pull_focus_toward_se: Pull the focused actor toward self.
behavior_primitives.store_focus_ref.name: Store Focus Reference
behavior_primitives.store_focus_ref.desc: Store the current focus in a named reference slot.
behavior_primitives.focus_ref.name: Focus Reference
behavior_primitives.focus_ref.descriptio: Restore focus from a named reference slot.
behavior_primitives.branch_focus_adjacen: Return true if the focused actor is adjacent to self.
behavior_primitives.step_self_toward_foc: Move self one tile toward the focused tile or actor.
behavior_primitives.add_self_counter.des: Add to a named counter on self.
behavior_primitives.branch_self_counter_: Return true if a named counter on self is at least the step amount.
behavior_primitives.consume_self_counter: Consume a named counter from self and return true if successful.
behavior_primitives.damage_actors_on_own: Damage actors on tiles with a condition owned by self.
behavior_primitives.clear_owned_tile_con: Remove a tile condition owned by self.
behavior_primitives.apply_focus_tile_con: Apply a condition owned by self to the focused tile.
behavior_primitives.branch_self_adjacent: Return true if self is adjacent to blocking terrain.
behavior_primitives.heal_self.name: Heal Self
behavior_primitives.heal_self.descriptio: Heal self by the step amount.
behavior_primitives.set_first_adjacent_c: Set the first clear adjacent tile to the requested tile state.
behavior_primitives.branch_event_tile_st: Return true if the event tile has the requested tile state.
behavior_primitives.set_event_tile_state: Set the event tile to the requested tile state.
behavior_primitives.branch_event_actor_h: Return true if the event actor is hostile to the current lingering target.
behavior_primitives.damage_event_actor.d: Damage the actor supplied by the current event.
behavior_primitives.damage_event_actor_b: Damage Event Actor By Lingering Counter
Damage the event actor by a counter on the current lingering effect.
behavior_primitives.prevent_event_damage: Reduce the current damage event to 0.
behavior_primitives.add_lingering_counte: Add to a named counter on the current lingering effect.
behavior_primitives.consume_lingering_co: Consume a named counter from the current lingering effect and return true if successful.
behavior_primitives.branch_lingering_cou: Return true if a named counter on the current lingering effect is at least the step amount.
behavior_primitives.branch_lingering_tar: Return true if a named counter on the current lingering target is at least the step amount.
behavior_primitives.damage_event_actor_b: Damage Event Actor By Target Counter
Damage the event actor by a counter on the current lingering target.
behavior_primitives.consume_lingering_ta: Consume a named counter from the current lingering target and return true if successful.
behavior_primitives.detach_lingering.des: Remove the current lingering effect from its target.
behavior_primitives.composite_damage.des: Example composite primitive that runs the damage behavior graph.
lingering.poison.name: Poison
lingering.bleed.name: Bleed
lingering.lightning_shield.name: Lightning Shield
lingering.ward.name: Ward
enemies.glass_hound.name: Glass Hound
enemies.glass_hound.purpose: Chases the player and rewards push/terrain play.
enemies.ash_scribe.name: Ash Scribe
enemies.ash_scribe.purpose: Marks tiles, then punishes standing on marked ground.
enemies.root_saint.name: Root Saint
enemies.root_saint.purpose: Raises terrain and heals near blocking tiles.
enemies.generic.name: Enemy
rules.none.name: No Local Rule
rules.none.description: No special local rule is active.
rules.brittle_stone.name: Brittle Stone
rules.brittle_stone.description: Pushing an actor into raised stone breaks the stone and deals 1 damage.
relics.patient_bell.name: Patient Bell
relics.patient_bell.description: Example relic scaffold. It listens after a spell resolves and routes through a behavior hook.
workings.mark_or_damage.name: Mark or Damage
workings.emergency_wall.name: Emergency Wall
ui.codex.title: Clause Codex
ui.codex.help: Clauses are spell nodes. Add them to the board, then connect output ports into another node's IN port.
ui.codex.flow.condition: Flow: TRUE continues when the condition passes; FALSE continues when it fails.
ui.codex.flow.next: Flow: NEXT continues to the connected clause.
ui.play.hint: Click a tile to target. E toggles the node editor.
ui.graph.input_tooltip: Connect the pending output to this node.
ui.graph.output_tooltip: Click this output, then click another node's IN.
